tracks.rawText: 3:43Latido a distanciav5.5Epic cinematic psytrance track at 145 BPM with powerful prehispanic Mexican tribal influences, Highly rhythmic, hypnotic and energetic with long, evolving and emotional loops that build intensity over time, Dominant and expressive ancient prehispanic flutes like quena and ocarina, with powerful melodic leads, fast arpeggios, call-and-response phrases and rich layered harmonies, Deep rolling psytrance bassline and punchy kick driving the track forward, Strong tribal percussion including huehuetl and teponaztli with complex rhythmic patterns, Add cinematic choir elements with wide, atmospheric, emotional and epic vocal layers, creating a sacred and transcendental feeling, Rich psychedelic sound design with delays, reverbs and spatial movement, Jungle ambience, wind, mystical textures and ritual chanting elements, The track should feel like a massive ancient ceremony turned into a cinematic experience, magical, epic, spiritual, hypnotic and full of energy, with powerful emotionalAzteKi3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Latido a distancia

tracks.rawText: 2:17Foto Conexiónv5.5Reggaeton, Latin pop, Latin hip-hop with dembow at 96 BPM, punchy 808 sub-bass, syncopated kick/snare, and crisp guiro/clap percussion, Latin pop sheen from bright synth pads, plucked nylon guitar, piano, and lush vocal harmonies; Latin hip-hop verses use tight drum-machine stabs, filtered bass, ad-lib chops, and delay throws1PublishRemix
